basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 05-08-2026. In this article, you'll find the Junior Research Fellow recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, email application procedure, and direct links to the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./ME/MSc. in Civil Engineering (Transportation Engineering), Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Data Science, or allied fields with minimum CPI 6.5 or 60% marks and valid GATE/NET, B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. in Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning and Computing or allied fields with at least 70% marks or 7.5 CPI and valid GATE/NET
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.Tech./ME/MSc. in Civil Engineering (Transportation Engineering), Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Data Science, or allied fields with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks with valid GATE/NET (UGC, CSIR, etc.) qualified (or) B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. in Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning and Computing or allied fields with at least 70% marks or 7.5 CPI with valid GATE/NET (UGC, CSIR, etc.) qualified.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: M.Tech./ME/MSc. in Civil Engineering (Transportation Engineering), Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Data Science, or allied fields with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks with valid GATE/NET (UGC, CSIR, etc.) qualified (or) B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. in Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning and Computing or allied fields with at least 70% marks or 7.5 CPI with valid GATE/NET (UGC, CSIR, etc.) qualified.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is 05 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Tech./ME/MSc. or B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. in specific engineering or data science fields with a minimum percentage and valid GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000 plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email with all required documents attached. The specific email address will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will involve an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Kanpur offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
